basic_details.short_information: Maharishi Dayanand University Rohtak (MDU) Lecture Basis Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of MDU. Eligible candidates can apply for the MDU Lecture Basis Recruitment 2026 through the offline mode.

qualification.details: Chemistry: Ph.D. in Chemistry Defence & Strategic Studies: Ph.D. in Defence & Strategic Studies Geography: Ph.D. in Geography History: Ph.D. in History Hindi: Ph.D. in Hindi Music: Ph.D. in Music Physics: Ph.D. in Physics Psychology: Ph.D. in Psychology Public Administration: Ph.D. in Public Administration Civil Engineering, University Institute of Engineering & Technology: Ph.D. in Civil Engineering Visual Arts: Ph.D. in Visual Arts MDU – CPAS (Law) – History & Sociology: Ph.D. in Law, History & Sociology

vacancy_details.Post Name: Civil Engineering, University Institute of Engineering & Technology

post_wise_breakdown.post_name: Civil Engineering, University Institute of Engineering & Technology

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 600/- per hour (theory), Rs. 300/- per hour (practical)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MDU Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: MDU Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the MDU Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download MDU Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.event: Last date of submission of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for MDU Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MDU Lecture Basis posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the MDU Lecture Basis posts is 27th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the establishment branch by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for these Lecture Basis posts at MDU is a Ph.D. Degree. Candidates holding a Ph.D. in the respective subjects are eligible to apply.

faq.question: Q3. How can I apply for the MDU recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for MDU recruitment is offline. You need to submit your application with a CV and photograph as a hard copy to the Establishment Branch (Teaching), M.D. University, Rohtak.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary structure for the Lecture Basis posts?
faq.answer: The salary is paid on an hourly basis: Rs. 600/- per hour for theory classes and Rs. 300/- per hour for practical classes, with a maximum monthly cap of Rs. 26,400/- and a semester cap of Rs. 75,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. Are there any specific vacancies mentioned for each post?
faq.answer: The notification indicates 0 vacancies for each of the listed posts. It is advisable to check the official notification for the most current information.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these Lecture Basis positions at MDU is on a contract basis for the academic session 2026-27.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link will be available in the "Important Links" section of this article. Please check there for the download link.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for MDU recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the provided data, no application fee is mentioned for this recruitment. Candidates are advised to verify this information in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The jobs are located at Maharishi Dayanand University, Rohtak, Haryana.

faq.question: Q10. What is the brief description of this recruitment?
faq.answer: MDU Rohtak is inviting applications for the empanelment of Ph.D. Degree holders to work on a Lecture Basis for the academic session 2026-27.
